titleStmt.title: SII 20.140: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 140. (B.K. No. 57 of 1936-37.) KANNOḶḶI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the right wall of the temple of Hanumān.

summary.p: This badly damaged record is dated in the year 9 of Tribhuvanaikavīradēva, Tāraṇa, Āshāḍha, s11u. 2[4], [Thursday], Dakshiṇāyana-Saṁkrānti. The details correspond to A.D. 1164, June 25, Thursday.

The inscription records a gift of certain incomes made to the temple of Chikkēśvara-Nāgēs11vara constructed by Bāchiseṭṭi and Nāgiseṭṭi at Kannavaḷḷi, by Rāmayya-daṇḍanāyaka, Brahmadēva-daṇḍanāyaka, ten prabhus of bhatta-grāma Kannavaḷḷi and other bodies. Kannavaḷḷi is stated to be stituated in Tārdavāḍi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu kaḷacuryya tribhuvanaykavīradēvavarṣada 9 neya tāraṇa
saṁvatsarada Āśāḍa suddha vyatīpāta dakṣiṇāyana saṁkrāṁti nimittadiṁ .
svasti samastarājyabharanirūpita mahā śata prabhu maṁtrō
tsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpaṁna sahajaprasaṁna ruguyajussāmātharvvēda ṣṭāṁgapā
rāvārapārāyaṇa śiṣṭa lakṣmīsamāliṁgi
ta svabhujabaḷama dēvarājya sudhākarasauṁdarya kamaḷinīdivākara
nenippa śrīmadaṁtaḥpurādhyakṣa mahāpradhānaṁ rāmayyadaṁḍanāyakapramukha mayduna .
brahmadēvadaṁḍanāyakaru mu patināyaka parigraha
ṟeya caṁḍeyanāyakanu . rāmeyanāyakanuṁ . samastaparigrahamuṁ .
mukhyavāgi śrīmattarddavāḍināḍa baḷiya bhattagrāmaṁ kaṁnavaḷḷiya prabhugaḷuṁ Eṁṭu hi
ṭṭu paṁcamaṭha sthānamaṁ Aṟuvattokaluṁ dēsi muṁmuridaṁḍaruṁ sthalada seṭṭiyaruṁ
samastavaśēṣaruṁ neredu Alliya vaḍḍavyavahāri bāciseṭṭi nāgiseṭṭiyarmmāḍisida
śrīcikkēśvaranāgēśvaradēvadēgula
yaru . pūje punaskāra khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ caitrapavitrakkaṁ vādiyā
gi dēvakāryyamaṁ bhaktiyiṁ māḍuttiraladakke saṁtasaṁ biṭṭu niṁma hiriya māḍisida dharmamaṁ
nīmārayvadu yallirda jīyaru tapōdhanaraṁtu Ā sthānamaṁ niṁma makka
ḷu tappade yeṁteṁdu śāsanamāgi koṭṭa kāryavaṁ mā nima
dharmamaṁ pratipāḷi māna
voṁdu koṇḍalli mānavondu Ā hattu
© Intidanaḷida mahāpātaka ḷeydu bīḷgu . mattaṁtida diṁda .
paramāpadamaṁ paḍeguṁ
puṇyakṣētramā priyadiṁ sōvidēva mahēśanolaviṁ
kannavaḷḷiya cikkēśvaradiṁ
Digital edition of SII 20.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
